reasoning: The control CCCS IA-4 focuses on identifier management, which in Kubernetes can be mapped to the management of service accounts and RBAC policies. Ensuring that service accounts are not using default configurations, that tokens are not automatically mounted, and that each pod has a unique service account are key practices in identifier management. Additionally, enforcing least privilege is crucial to minimizing access and managing identifiers effectively.
title: CCCS IA-4: Identifier Management
